title: kernel CVE-2021-31829
description: A flaw was found in the Linux kernel's eBPF verification code. By default, accessing the eBPF verifier is only accessible to privileged users with CAP_SYS_ADMIN. This flaw allows a local user who can insert eBPF instructions to use the eBPF verifier to abuse a spectre-like flaw and infer all system memory.
